            4. The тАЬinterpolationтАЭ theorem is not yet a theorem
            The draft says the polynomial ╬иa,b basis and the principal-part ╧Бa,b basis are тАЬtwo
            different bases of the same g-module,тАЭ interpolated by the Rees/Moyal parameter тДП. But
                                                                   тАЛ                                                   тАЛ




            the same section also says the PBW special-fibre map is not an h-module isomorphism
            and that the actions diverge explicitly. main
            Those two statements cannot both be literally true.
            If two bases are bases of the same h-module, the matrices of the action must be
            conjugate. But the polynomial action is locally nilpotent under linear Hamiltonians, while
            the principal-part action is not. Your own no-go theorem says ordinary polynomial
            boundary observables cannot realize the principal-part module precisely because local
            nilpotence is preserved under module isomorphism. main
            So the corrected statement should be:
                                 ╬иa,b and ╧Бa,b are not two bases of the same h-module.
                                        тАЛ              тАЛ                                                                   тАЛ




            They are two different realizations of the same label set or the same PBW/cotangent
            formal symbol set:
                                                                           A╦Йdesc тЙЕ hтИиcont
                                                                                    тАЛ                   тАЛ




            as graded vector spaces, but not as h-modules.

            10. The chain-level primitive projection should be renamed
            The theorem currently says the primitive projection
                                                               cot             cl,pp            pp
                                                              ╧Аprim : ObsтИВ,N тЖа AтИВ
                                                                       тАЛ                 тАЛ           тАЛ




https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                                83/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                   Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            is a surjection to an тАЬindecomposable P0 quotientтАЭ and explicitly says multiplication of
            two positive primitive generators is zero after projection. main
                                                                        тАЛ




            Thenppit should not be presented as a factorization algebra equivalence or as a morphism
            to AтИВ with its ordinary commutative multiplication.
                      тАЛ




            The right name is:
                                                primitive Lie/P0 quotient projection
                                                                                тАЛ                                  тАЛ




            not
                                                  cotangent factorization-center lift.

            A factorization algebra remembers products. If your quotient kills products of positive
            primitives, it is not the same algebraic object as the factorization algebra generated by
            those primitives. It is the indecomposable Lie shadow of that algebra.
            This is still useful. But call it what it is.

            11. The physics can be made much stronger
            The paper should not sound like it is borrowing physics decorations from string theory. It
            should sound like it is deriving the structure from three physical principles.
            Principle 1: Dirac constrained probes
            The brane stack probes the formal symplectic disk. The normal coordinates become
            matrices:
                                                                       z i тЗЭ ╧Хi .
                                                                            тАЛ                 тАЛ




            The symplectic potential is forced:
                                                              ╬╕N = Tr(╧Х1 d╧Х2 ).
                                                                   тАЛ                      тАЛ           тАЛ




            Conjugation invariance gives the moment map
                                                             ╬╝╧╡ = тИТ Tr(╧╡[╧Х1 , ╧Х2 ]).
                                                               тАЛ                                  тАЛ       тАЛ




            The first-order action is therefore

https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                             84/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                            Whitepaper Critical Analysis


                                                    SтИВ = тИл Tr(╧Х1 d╧Х2 + A[╧Х1 , ╧Х2 ]).
                                                         тАЛ               тАЛ               тАЛ        тАЛ                           тАЛ       тАЛ




                                                                     R

            The BV variable
                                                                                 ╧И = AтИЧ

            records the constraint:
                                                                             Q╧И = [╧Х1 , ╧Х2 ].     тАЛ               тАЛ




            This is not an analogy. It is Dirac reduction in BV form.
            Principle 2: Witten closed-open centrality
            A closed insertion near a brane is not merely a boundary value. It is a central operation
            on all open measurements. Therefore the target is not the open algebra but
                                                                              P0
                                                                             Zfact
                                                                                 тАЛ




                                                                                   (Obsopen ).
                                                                                     тАЛ                        тАЛ




            The trace
                                                                     f тЖж Tr f (╧Х1 , ╧Х2 )              тАЛ               тАЛ




            is only the moment-map shadow.
            Principle 3: Cotangent fields are transverse currents
            The dual of a holomorphic Hamiltonian is not another holomorphic Hamiltonian. It is a
            residue current:
                                                             ╧Бa,b = z1тИТaтИТ1 z2тИТbтИТ1 dz1 dz2 .
                                                                 тАЛ                           тАЛ            тАЛ               тАЛ       тАЛ




            This is the holomorphic analogue of the fact that momentum is not multiplication by a
            function but a distributional/derivative operation. The brane is a defect, so cotangent
            boundary modes are naturally transverse delta-currents.
            These three principles should be the first section. They make factorization algebra feel
            physically inevitable.

            the core theorem. The local paper is already ambitious. References to Vol III, Igusa, BKM,

            private convention appendix or a separate тАЬprogrammatic outlookтАЭ note. The draft itself
            says these transfers are local-only and non-transferable without matched-convention
            proofs. main
            A paper this mathematically delicate needs to feel surgically self-contained.

            105. Add a тАЬDirac bracket versus Poisson bracketтАЭ
            clarification
            The open phase space is constrained:
                                                                          [╧Х1 , ╧Х2 ] = 0.
                                                                             тАЛ        тАЛ




            You use the original canonical Poisson bracket on gauge-invariant functions and pass to
            Hamiltonian reduction. Explain:
                The constraints are first-class.
                The Poisson bracket of gauge-invariant functions descends to the reduced phase
                space.
                The bracket on trace functions is computed upstairs and then reduced.
            Do not call it a Dirac bracket unless you mean gauge-fixed second-class Dirac bracket.
            Use тАЬDirac reductionтАЭ for constraints.

            135. Fix тАЬdimension 1 + 4тАЭ phrasing
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                              Whitepaper Critical Analysis




            The draft says 1 + 4-real-dimensional spacetime R2 ├Ч C2 around a line. But R2 ├Ч C2
            is 2 + 4 = 6 real dimensions. The brane is one real dimension. If you say тАЬ1 + 4,тАЭ
            explain that one of the R2 directions is the brane and one is transverse topological.

            201. One-paragraph strongest-version vision
            The strongest conceivable version of this whitepaper is not a speculative string note. It
            is a theorem-driven Dirac-Witten local model: a brane stack is a constrained matrix
            probe of a formal symplectic disk; its stable Hamiltonian trace algebra is the open
            measurement algebra; the closed Hamiltonian BF theory is the shifted cotangent theory
            of canonical transformations; and the closed CE observables are exactly the derived
            Poisson central operations on the open algebra. The polynomial one-╧И descendants are
            the PBW-special-fibre shadow, while the true cotangent modes are principal-part
            residue currents supported at the defect. The scalar U (1) anomaly is the same class
            classically and quantum mechanically, and the degree-zero quantum sector is governed
            by the Weyl/Moyal deformation, with the full Costello graph realization isolated as the
            remaining analytic theorem.

            The coadjoint action is defined by

            action. The latest draft still sometimes calls it lowering; that should be renamed.

            Layer 7: stable large-N bulk-boundary Koszul horizon
            This is the conjectural open/closed horizon:
                                                                  lim AN тЙГ B ! .

            It should remain conjectural.
            The local theorem proves Layers 1тАУ6 in the stated models. It does not prove the
            large-N open algebra is deformation-level Koszul dual to the closed algebra. The PBW
            shadow and the CE/PV center theorem are essential evidence, but the ╬и-versus-╧Б no-
            go prevents collapsing the layers.
            The latest ledger correctly marks stable bulk-boundary Koszul duality as conjectural and
            not used to prove the local Hamiltonian BF/Moyal core. main

            III. Resolutions of the seven named obligations
            You listed seven obligations. The clean paper should not merely say they remain open; it
            should either solve the reduced form, prove a no-go, or isolate the missing theorem so
            sharply that the direction is cleared.

            Constructive resolution
            There are exactly three clean solutions. The paper should state them as alternatives.

            Solution A: supertrace cancellation
            Replace the ordinary Chan-Paton algebra glN by a super Chan-Paton algebra gl(N тИгN )
            with supertrace.
                                                                                 тАЛ




            Then
                                                             Str(I) = N тИТ N = 0.

            Therefore the scalar contact becomes
                                                             тДП Str(I) ╧Й(f , g) = 0.

            The scalar anomaly vanishes.
            This is the cleanest QME route, but it changes the brane stack.

            Solution B: unreduced scalar primitive
            Do not scalar-reduce. Work with
                                                       hpoly = C[z1 , z2 ] = A╦Й тКХ C тЛЕ 1.
                                                             тАЛ          тАЛ    тАЛ




            The cocycle

            is a coboundary on hpoly :            тАЛ




                                                         ╧Й = ╬┤╬╖,            ╬╖(f ) = тИТ[f ]0 .       тАЛ




            Thus the QME scalar obstruction is exact before scalar reduction.
            Add a scalar closed boundary field ╧Г with
                                                                      Q╧Г = ╬│1        тАЛ




            or, equivalently, add a counterterm

29/04/2026, 20:04                                                            Whitepaper Critical Analysis


                                                    Cscalar = тИТтДПN ╬╖(f ) тИл a(t)╬│1 (t) dt.
                                                             тАЛ                                тАЛ                   тАЛ




                                                                                          R

            Then

                                                                                                      R

            cancelling Obsc .        тАЛ

            Solution C: central character renormalization

                                         тАЛ




                                                                         Tr(I) = ╧З.

            Define renormalized trace generators

            This is physically a choice of background central charge.

            Remaining Costello theorem
            A Costello graph theorem is exactly the statement that the renormalized brane-defect
            BV model reduces to this Wick boundary model with cross-contraction тДПP /2, after

            and brane-defect kernel whose boundary cross-contraction is тДПP /2, whose QME

            boundary product is the reduced Wick product.

            6. Same-action Rees/Fourier ╬и тЖФ ╧Б bridge
            Current status
            The latest draft says the Fourier-Rees bridge is only an associated-graded label
            comparison and not an h-module identification. It also explains that the Fourier-
            transformed linear operators remain locally nilpotent on the Fourier-delta lattice,
            whereas the principal-part coadjoint operators are not locally nilpotent after inverting тДП.
                    main

            Clean resolution

            There is a no-go theorem and a modified positive theorem.

            7. Cross-volume consequences
            Current status
            The latest ledger correctly says no compact Calabi-Yau, global BCOV, Vol III, chiral-
            homology, Borcherds, BKM, Igusa, K3 ├Ч E , or sister-volume theorem follows from the
            local calculation without a separate matched-conventions proof. main
            Clean resolution
            Add a theorem, not just a disclaimer.
            Theorem. Local-disk non-transfer theorem.
            The local Hamiltonian BF/Moyal theorem supplies only the following datum:
                                                    (C[[z1 , z2 ]]/C, dz1 тИз dz2 , P , [c╦Й])
                                                              тАЛ   тАЛ            тАЛ             тАЛ




            as a formal-disk normalization. It does not determine:
             1. compact Calabi-Yau global fields;
             2. global BCOV anomaly classes;
             3. chiral homology over a compact curve;
             4. BKM denominator data;
             5. Igusa cusp form coefficients;
             6. K3 ├Ч E reductions;
             7. sister-volume convention transfers.
            A cross-volume consequence is valid only after supplying a matched-conventions
            morphism
                                                                  Nlocal тЖТ Nglobal
                                                                       тАЛ                 тАЛ




            that preserves:
            degree shifts,              pairings,            central classes,          factorization products,   normalizatio
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                               198/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                                      Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            Proof: all listed global structures require data absent from the formal disk, so no
            functorial implication exists.
            This converts the firewall into a theorem.

            VI. Final structure of the platonic clean paper
           The ideal paper should have this table of contents:
            1. Three principles: Dirac, Witten, Grothendieck.
            2. Local mixed model and field content.
            3. Dirac brane probe theorem.
            4. Stable trace and one-╧И PBW shadow.
            5. Stratified Koszul duality: Layers 0тАУ7.
            6. CE/PV derived P0-center theorem.
            7. Matlis principal-part cotangent theorem.
                                               тАЛ




            8. Brane-line factorization currents.
            9. Unreduced cyclic-word principal-part centrality homotopy.
           10. Scalar U (1) anomaly and QME cancellation alternatives.
           11. Degree-zero Moyal/Weyl theorem.
           12. Radial-parts theorem: conditional or fully proved appendix.
           13. Reduced Wick graph theorem and Costello realization problem.
           14. Weighted Tate regulator and strict endpoint no-go.
           15. Cross-volume non-transfer theorem.
           16. Appendices: signs, Matlis, factorization currents, bubble-sort homotopy, Moyal
               coefficients, radial parts, QME obstruction, bibliography.

            VII. The one-sentence mathematical core
            The paper should ultimately read as proving:

                            Oclosed,H = CCE

            where the open algebra is the Dirac-reduced stable brane probe algebra

            That is the clean theorem. Everything else is either a deformation, a regulator, a graph

                                                       {Bf (a), Bg (b)} = B{f ,g} (ab),
                                                                 тАЛ                    тАЛ                                     тАЛ




                                                       {Bf (a), ╬Ш╧Б (B)} = ╬Шf тЛЕ╧Б (aB),
                                                             тАЛ                    тАЛ                                 тАЛ




                                                             {╬Ш╧Б (B), ╬Ш╧Г (C)} = 0.
                                                                         тАЛ                      тАЛ




            Here aB is multiplication of a distribution by a smooth function. No product of two
            arbitrary distributions is required.
            This is a reduced defect-current model, not yet the full unreduced BV factorization-
            center morphism. The latest claim ledger says exactly this: the reduced principal-part
            boundary sector is post-contraction only and is not an unreduced open observable
            algebra. main

            2. Koszul duality as the theory of possible bulk-boundary
            couplings
            This is the new organizing content that should be inserted into the paper.
            Koszul duality is not just a way to compare two algebras after they have already been
            built. In this setting, it is the type system for allowed couplings between bulk and
            boundary algebras.
            The closed algebra is
                                                                                  тИЩ
                                                                             B = CCE (g).               тАЛ




            The open algebra is a P0-factorization algebra
                                                  тАЛ




https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                      222/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                  Whitepaper Critical Analysis

                                                                A = Obscl
                                                                       open,H .                                       тАЛ




            A classical closed-open coupling is not a map
                                                                      B тЖТ A.

            It is a map
                                                                       P0
                                                              ╬║ : B тЯ╢ Zfact (A).                          тАЛ




                                                                                                              тАЛ           тАЛ




            Since
                                                                         тИЩ
                                                                    B = CCE (g),              тАЛ




            a map
                                                                     тИЩ
                                                                    CCE (g) тЖТ RтАЛ




            to a complete commutative dg algebra R is equivalent, under the usual CE/Maurer-
            Cartan dictionary, to a Maurer-Cartan element
                                                                    ╬Ш╬║ тИИ g тКЧR +
                                                                       тАЛ                              тАЛ           тАЛ




            satisfying
                                                                  1
                                                             d╬Ш╬║ + [╬Ш╬║ , ╬Ш╬║ ] = 0.
                                                                  2
                                                                тАЛ          тАЛ          тАЛ                       тАЛ




            Taking
                                                                         P0
                                                                    R = Zfact (A)         тАЛ




                                                                                                  тАЛ




            says:
                                                                             P0
                      closed-open couplings are Maurer-Cartan elements in gтКЧZfact (A).                                        тАЛ
                                                                                                                                  тАЛ




                                                                                                                                      тАЛ   тАЛ




            Equivalently, by bar-cobar/Koszul duality,
                                                                    B ! тЙГ U (g),

            so the same coupling is an action of
                                                                           U (g)

            by derived central operations on A.
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                                    223/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                                             Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            Thus the coupling problem is:
             Find representations of the Koszul-dual closed enveloping algebra in the derived ce

            This is the precise algebraic form of the Witten closed-open principle.

            2.1 Coupling data in components
            For the shifted cotangent Lie algebra
                                                                                      g = h тЛЙ hтИи [1],

            a coupling
                                                                           тИЩ
                                                                          CCE (g) тЖТ Z P0 (A)  тАЛ
                                                                                                                                        тАЛ




            is specified by two families:
                                                             XI := ╬║(cI ) тИИ Z P0 (A)1 ,

                                                                      1 K

                                                                           L

            For

            this becomes:
                                                                        1 K

                                                                              тАЛ                       тАЛ                     тАЛ                           тАЛ                   тАЛ




            Interpretation:
             1. XI are derived vector-field operations.
             2. ╬╝I are boundary Hamiltonian functions.
                           тАЛ




                       тАЛ




https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                                                                              224/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                     Whitepaper Critical Analysis

             3. The first equation says the XI encode the Hamiltonian Lie bracket up to the
                 Poisson differential.

             4. The second equation says ╬╝ is an equivariant moment map in the derived center.
            For the canonical brane probe,
                                                                        A = S (h),

                                                                        XI = ╬╕ I ,тАЛ

            Then the equations become exactly the CE/PV theorem.

            2.3 Coupling obstruction theory
            A proposed coupling
                                                                    тИЩ
                                                               ╬║ : CCE (g) тЖТ Z P0 (A)
                                                                           тАЛ
                                                                                                                  тАЛ




            can fail in exactly four ways.
            Obstruction 1: CE source obstruction
            Trying to send
                                                                           cI тЖж OI                тАЛ




            fails because cI is not a closed length-one CE class. The Lie algebra h is perfect, so
            Hamiltonian CE coordinates are not closed.
            Resolution:
                                                              cI тЖж ╬╕ I ,                        uI тЖж O I .
                                                                                                      тАЛ                   тАЛ




            Obstruction 2: cotangent module obstruction
            Trying to use
                                                                                   ╬иa,b     тАЛ




            as the coadjoint module fails because the h-action is wrong. The principal-part module
                                                                      P = hтИиcont                          тАЛ




            is forced.
            Resolution:
                                                             ╧Бa,b = z1тИТaтИТ1 z2тИТbтИТ1 dz1 dz2 .
                                                                 тАЛ                  тАЛ                         тАЛ       тАЛ       тАЛ




            Obstruction 3: scalar central obstruction
            The scalar-reduced bracket kills
                                                                     {z1 , z2 } = 1,
                                                                               тАЛ        тАЛ




https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                            226/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                            Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            but the brane bracket gives
                                                             {Tr ╧Х1 , Tr ╧Х2 } = N .
                                                                     тАЛ            тАЛ




            Resolution options:
             1. keep the scalar central extension;
             2. impose scalar reduction;
             3. cancel with supertrace;
             4. absorb by central character;
             5. add a scalar counterterm.
            Obstruction 4: analytic QME obstruction
            The formal algebraic derived center does not automatically give a Costello renormalized
            brane-defect QME solution.
            Resolution requires a brane-defect graph theorem with propagator, counterterms,
            anomaly cancellation, and centrality homotopies.

            Algorithm 2. Classical ordering-independence by bubble sort
            Input: a cyclic word w in x = ╧Х1, y = ╧Х2.          тАЛ                                         тАЛ




            Goal: construct a chain homotopy between [w] and [xayb ].
            Procedure:

                                                    ws = As yxBs ,                                                               ws+1 = As xyBs .

                                                                                              s

                                               тАЛ    тАЛ                                     тАЛ   тАЛ                   тАЛ       тАЛ   тАЛ   тАЛ




                    the sum telescopes:

            This algorithm should be reused to build unreduced centrality homotopies.

            Algorithm 3. Constructing ╬иa,b                                  тАЛ




            Input: a, b тЙе 0.

                transitions equals the number of cyclic yx-transitions, so the sum cancels.

            5. Direct resolutions of the seven obligations
            Obligation 1. All-N radial-parts normalization
            The latest ledger still marks all-N radial-parts normalization as conditional: the formal
            Moyal algebra is proved, but the exact Weyl-trace image normalization still needs either
            a source match or a direct proof. main
            The clean resolution is to replace the ambiguous ordinary Weyl-trace map by a radially
            normalized trace map.
            Define the quantum Hamiltonian reduction
                                                                 RN = NWN (IN )/IN ,         тАЛ
                                                                                                 тАЛ           тАЛ           тАЛ




            where
                                                                      WN = DтДП (glN ),
                                                                                   тАЛ                 тАЛ           тАЛ




            and IN is the quantum moment ideal for conjugation.
                       тАЛ




https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                                       237/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                          Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            Let
                                                                   RadN : RN тЖТ Dsym,N
                                                                               тАЛ            тАЛ                   тАЛ




            be the radial-parts homomorphism.
            Define the normalized trace map by the universal property:
                                                               N
                                             RadN (JN (f )) = тИС OpW (f )(xi , тДПтИВxi ).
                                                    rad
                                                       тАЛ                                            тАЛ   тАЛ           тАЛ


                                                                                                                                    тАЛ
                                                                                                                                        тАЛ       тАЛ




                                                              i=1


            Then the finite-N Moyal identity becomes immediate in the radial image:
                                тДПтИТ1 [RadN JNrad (f ), RadN JNrad (g)] = RadN JNrad ({f , g}тДП ).
                                                 тАЛ         тАЛ                       тАЛ            тАЛ                       тАЛ                   тАЛ       тАЛ




            If RadN is injective on the subalgebra generated by the JNrad(f ), then
                         тАЛ                                                                                                  тАЛ




                                               тДПтИТ1 [JNrad (f ), JNrad (g)] = JNrad ({f , g}тДП ).
                                                                       тАЛ               тАЛ                    тАЛ                   тАЛ




            This resolves normalization constructively: the all-N map is defined by its radial image.
            The remaining comparison theorem is only:
                             JNrad (f ) = Tr OpW (f )(X, Y ) + Capelli triangular lower terms.
                                 тАЛ                             тАЛ




            That comparison can be proved by filtration:
             1. both sides have the same associated graded symbol;
             2. their radial images agree by definition;
             3. the difference lies in lower degree;
             4. repeat by induction;
             5. scalar terms are fixed by JNrad(1) = N .                   тАЛ




            So the paper should define JNrad first and treat ordinary Weyl traces as a comparison
            theorem, not as the primary definition.
                                                                   тАЛ

            10. One-paragraph final synthesis
            Koszul duality in this paper is not merely a comparison between a closed algebra and a
            large-N open algebra. It is the algebraic mechanism that classifies which bulk fields are
            allowed to couple to which boundary operations. A closed CE algebra CCE тИЩ
                                                                                       (g) can
            couple to the brane only by a map into the derived P0-center of the open algebra;
                                                                                                                       тАЛ




            equivalently, by a Maurer-Cartan/twisting datum or by an action of the Koszul-dual
                                                                                                         тАЛ




            enveloping algebra U (g) through central operations. In this type system, Hamiltonian
            bulk generators become vector-field operations, shifted cotangent CE coordinates
            become boundary Hamiltonian functions, Matlis principal parts become the
            deformation-correct cotangent currents, PBW descendants become only special-fibre
            labels, and the scalar U (1) class measures the obstruction to unreduced lifting. That is
            the conceptual heart of the clean paper: Koszul duality is the grammar of closed-open
            coupling.

            My verdict: the mathematical spine is now real. The next level is not another patch. It
            is ruthless distillation, formalization of the coupling grammar, and converting every
            residual lane into either a theorem, a no-go theorem, or a precisely functorial
            obstruction complex.

            1. The foundational thesis, restated cleanly
            The paper should be read as proving the reduced local theorem
                                тИЩ
                               CCE,cont (h тЛЙ hтИиcont [1]) тЙЕ PV(S (h)) тЙГ Zred,Ham
                                            тАЛ                тАЛ
                                                                        P0
                                                                                (AHam
                                                                                  тИВ   ),                             тАЛ




                                                                                                                                 тАЛ   тАЛ




            where
                                                                 h = C[[z1 , z2 ]]/C тЛЕ 1
                                                                                тАЛ               тАЛ




            is the reduced Hamiltonian Lie algebra of the formal symplectic disk, and
                                                                        AHam
                                                                         тИВ  тАЛтЙГ S (h)

            is the stable scalar-reduced Hamiltonian trace algebra of the Dirac brane probe.
            The generator map is the type check:
                                                                           тИВ
                                                  cI тЯ╝ ╬╕ I =                  ,                         uI тЯ╝ O I .
                                                                          тИВOI
                                                                                        тАЛ                    тАЛ           тАЛ   тАЛ




                                                                                    тАЛ




            The boundary Hamiltonian observable

            the grammar of couplings
            The next upgrade is to stop treating Koszul duality as only a comparison theorem. In this
            setting, Koszul duality is the grammar of allowed bulk-boundary couplings.
            Let

                                                    B = CCE (g),    тАЛ                          g = h тЛЙ hтИи [1],

            be the closed algebra. Let A be an open P0-factorization algebra. A closed-open

            a coupling is an action of the Koszul-dual enveloping algebra by derived central

            3. Highest-level attack on the latest draft
            3.1 The current paper is now too well-protected to be attacked as
            тАЬwrongтАЭ
            The old fatal issues have mostly been addressed. The latest claim ledger explicitly says
            that ╬иa,b are PBW special-fibre classes, not principal-part cotangent modes; that the
            reduced principal-part sector is post-contraction only; that the degree-zero Moyal/Weyl
                            тАЛ




            sector excludes one-antifield descendants and graph realization; that weighted Tate is
            internal to the weighted model; and that cross-volume consequences are not asserted.
                     main        main

            The remaining attacks are now subtler:
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                                        264/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                       Whitepaper Critical Analysis

             1. The paper may still feel overbuilt. It has enough machinery to bury the main
                theorem.
             2. The terminology still sometimes says тАЬKoszul dualityтАЭ where it should say
                тАЬLayer 3 CE/PV,тАЭ тАЬLayer 4 PBW shadow,тАЭ or тАЬLayer 7 conjectural horizon.тАЭ
             3. The reduced theorem is elegant; the residual analytic/QME sections risk looking
                like appendices to a different project unless organized as obstruction
                complexes.
             4. The Matlis/principal-part construction is now correct, but it needs to be
                presented as inevitable, not as a technical repair.
             5. The quantum sector needs a canonical normalization principle, not a collection
                of computations.
             6. The work needs fewer slogans and more named theorems.
            3.2 The next great-paper move
            The next move is to make the manuscript look like:
             a theorem-driven local Dirac-Witten-Koszul model, with obstruction-theoretic fron

            That means:
                theorem names replace ambition;
                every residual is a functor, obstruction class, or no-go theorem;
                every use of тАЬKoszulтАЭ has a layer index;
                every physical principle has a mathematical theorem immediately underneath it;
                every analytic claim has a precise source, target, and missing datum.

            5.4 Make radial normalization primary
            Instead of defining finite-N quantum traces first by ordinary Weyl traces and then trying
            to prove a radial-parts identity, define a radially normalized trace
                                                                                       JNrad (f )

            by its radial image. Then ordinary Weyl trace equals JNrad plus triangular Capelli
            corrections. This makes normalization canonical.

            8. Final verdict
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                      Whitepaper Critical Analysis




            The latest draft is no longer merely a speculative whitepaper. It is becoming a serious
            theorem architecture. Its strongest form is:
             Dirac brane probe + CE/PV derived center + Matlis residue cotangent + scalar an

            The next step is to make the paper feel inevitable.
            The great version will read as follows:
             1. Dirac forces the open constrained matrix mechanics.
             2. Witten forces the target to be the derived center, not the open algebra.
             3. CE/PV identifies closed Hamiltonian BF observables with that center.
             4. Grothendieck-Matlis duality forces cotangent modes to be residue currents.
             5. PBW explains why polynomial ╬и-descendants appear, and why they are only the
                special-fibre shadow.
             6. The scalar U (1) class explains exactly where unreduced lifting and QME can fail.
             7. Moyal gives the formal quantum target.
             8. Costello/QME/global consequences are precise obstruction-theoretic frontiers, not
                vague promises.
            That is how this becomes not just correct, but memorable.

            3. The minimum complete architecture
            The final paper should have the following structure.
            Part I. Three principles
             1. Dirac: a brane stack is a constrained probe.
             2. Witten: closed fields target central operations, not just boundary functions.
             3. GrothendieckтАУMatlis: cotangent modes are residue currents, not polynomial
                descendants.
            The latest draft already states these principles; the improvement is to make each one
            immediately produce a theorem. main
            Part II. Algebraic construction
             1. Define the open Dirac matrix model.
             2. Compute its BV/Koszul algebra.
             3. Stabilize the trace sector.
             4. Compute the closed Hamiltonian BF CE algebra.
             5. Prove the CE/PV derived-center theorem.
             6. Identify the cotangent module by Matlis residues.
             7. Construct brane-line currents using ╬йтИЩc (I).
             8. State the reduced principal-part defect-current model.
                                                                     тАЛ




https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                  283/408
            Part III. Koszul-duality stratification
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                               Whitepaper Critical Analysis




            The paper must stratify тАЬKoszul dualityтАЭ into layers:
                             Layer                              Meaning
                               0                 operadic Lie/coComm Koszul duality
                               1                     Tate CE/bar-cobar identity
                               2            Tate Quillen/infinity-categorical enhancement
                               3       тАЛ          CE/PV derived P0 -center theorem             тАЛ               тАЛ   тАЛ




                               4                   PBW/Rees special-fibre shadow
                               5                Matlis/Grothendieck cotangent module
                               6                brane-line factorization current version
                               7           conjectural stable large-N bulk-boundary horizon

            Every occurrence of тАЬKoszul dualityтАЭ should carry one of these layer labels. Without this,
            reviewers will confuse the proved CE/PV theorem with the conjectural large-N horizon.
            Part IV. Quantum and obstruction theory
             1. Scalar U (1) anomaly.
             2. Moyal/Weyl formal target.
             3. Radial normalization problem.
             4. Principal-part quantum target.
             5. QME obstruction and cancellation mechanisms.
             6. Costello graph realization problem.
             7. Cross-volume firewall.
            The current draft already separates these by claim strength, which is correct.                             main

                                                    SтИВ = тИл Tr(╧Х1 d╧Х2 + A[╧Х1 , ╧Х2 ]).

            The field A is a one-dimensional connection and Lagrange multiplier. Its equation of

            This is not a metaphor. It is Dirac reduction written as a Koszul differential.

            5. Construction 2: stable trace algebra
            Let
                                                                 x = ╧Х1 ,           тАЛ                        y = ╧Х2 .    тАЛ




            At finite N , invariant functions of two matrices are generated by traces of words
                                                                           Tr(w(x, y)),

            with finite-N trace identities.
            In the degreewise stable range, ProcesiтАУRazmyslov invariant theory gives a free
            commutative algebra on cyclic words. The latest draft correctly uses this only
            degreewise, not as a finite-N statement. main
            The Koszul differential is
                                                                          Q╧И = xy тИТ yx.

            For any words u, v,
                                                     Q Tr(╧Иvu) = Tr((xy тИТ yx)vu).

            By cyclicity,
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                                       286/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                          Whitepaper Critical Analysis

                                                             Tr((xy)vu) = Tr(uxyv),

            and
                                                             Tr((yx)vu) = Tr(uyxv).

            Thus
                                                Q Tr(╧Иvu) = Tr(uxyv) тИТ Tr(uyxv).

            So adjacent swaps of x and y are Q-exact.
            Therefore every cyclic word with a copies of x and b copies of y becomes, in H 0(Q),
            the class
                                                                               Tr(xa y b ).

            After removing the scalar empty trace, the ghost-zero Hamiltonian sector is labelled by
                                                               z1a z2b ,
                                                                   тАЛ       тАЛ               a + b > 0.

            The corresponding open trace class is
                                                                   Oa,b = Tr(╧Хa1 ╧Хb2 ).
                                                                               тАЛ                      тАЛ           тАЛ




            6. Algorithm: bubble-sort homotopy for ordering
            independence
            This should be in the paper, because it is the elementary chain-level proof that no
            certificate is being smuggled in.
            Let w be a word in x, y. Choose a deterministic bubble-sort path
                                                         w = w 0 , w 1 , тАж , w r = xa y b .
                                                                       тАЛ               тАЛ                  тАЛ




            At step s, suppose
                                                 ws = As y xBs ,
                                                     тАЛ         тАЛ                   тАЛ          ws+1 = As xyBs .тАЛ               тАЛ   тАЛ




            Define
                                                             H([w]) = тИТ тИС[╧ИBs As ].               тАЛ                   тАЛ   тАЛ




                                                                                              s


https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                            287/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                       Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            Then
                                Q[╧ИBs As ] = [(xy тИТ yx)Bs As ] = [As xyBs ] тИТ [As y xBs ].
                                            тАЛ        тАЛ                              тАЛ        тАЛ           тАЛ        тАЛ        тАЛ   тАЛ




            Therefore the sum telescopes:
                                                             QH([w]) = [w] тИТ [xa y b ].

            So
                                                                       [w] тЙГ [xa y b ]

            by an explicit homotopy.
            This algorithm should later be reused to construct unreduced principal-part centrality
            homotopies.

            7. One-╧И primitive classes
            For a, b тЙе 0, let Wa,b be the set of words with a copies of x and b copies of y.

                                                               тАЛ                тАЛ




                                                                   wтИИWa,b   тАЛ




            Group terms by cyclic words of bidegree (a + 1, b + 1). Each cyclic word has the same
            number of xy-transitions as yx-transitions. Hence the signed sum cancels:
                                                                       Q╬иa,b = 0.        тАЛ

                                                    ╬иa,b are PBW special-fibre open labels.

            15. Coadjoint action on principal parts

            Pair with ╧Бa,b . The residue is nonzero only if

                                                  p + m тИТ 1 = a,                              q + n тИТ 1 = b.

             p(b тИТ q + 1) тИТ q(a тИТ p + 1) = pb тИТ pq + p тИТ qa + pq тИТ q = pb тИТ qa + p тИТ q.

            16. No-go theorem: polynomial descendants are not
            principal parts
            The open one-╧И descendants have action
                                                 Op,q : ╬иa,b тЯ╝ (pb тИТ qa)╬иa+pтИТ1,b+qтИТ1 .

                                                                  O1,0 : ╬иa,b тЯ╝ b ╬иa,bтИТ1 .
                                                                                 тАЛ                       тАЛ                       тАЛ




            But the principal-part action is
                                                          z1 : ╧Бa,b тЯ╝ тИТ(b + 1)╧Бa,b+1 .
                                                                 тАЛ                   тАЛ                                                       тАЛ




            These cannot be intertwined by the map
                                                                                         ╬иa,b тЖж ╧Бa,b .
                                                                                                     тАЛ                 тАЛ




            Moreover, on polynomial observables, z1 acts by a constant derivation, hence locally
            nilpotently. On principal parts,
                                                                                                 тАЛ

                                    z1r тЛЕ ╧Бa,b = (тИТ1)r (b + 1)(b + 2) тЛп (b + r)╧Бa,b+r =

            for every r.

                                                                тЯи╬иa,b тЯй тЙЕ

            This is not a weakness. It is a theorem explaining why the cotangent module must be
            distributional. The attached principal-parts note frames this as the Dirac distinction
            between functions and momenta/currents. Pasted text (2)

            17. PBW special fibre versus Matlis cotangent
            The PBW/Rees algebra is
                                     UтДП (g) = T (g)[[тДП]]/ (xy тИТ (тИТ1)тИгxтИгтИгyтИг yx тИТ тДП[x, y]) .
                                             тАЛ




            At тДП = 0,
                                                     UтДП (g)/(тДП) тЙЕ S (g) = S (h тКХ hтИи [1]).
                                                         тАЛ




            The open stable PBW shadow is
                                                              S(A╦Й тКХ A╦Йdesc [1]).     тАЛ




            The identification
                                                               A╦Йdesc тЖФ тЯи╬иa,b тЯй
                                                                    тАЛ                     тАЛ




            is a PBW special-fibre statement.
            The identification
                                                                 hтИиcont тЙЕ P тАЛ




            is a Matlis/coadjoint statement.
            These are different layers.
            So the paper must say:
                              ╬иa,b and ╧Бa,b share bidegree labels, not module structure.
                                     тАЛ               тАЛ                                                         тАЛ

            18. FourierтАУRees bridge
            There is a bridge, but it changes polarization.
            Let
                                           DтДП = C[[тДП]]тЯиz1 , z2 , тИВ1 , тИВ2 тЯй/([тИВi , zj ] = тДП╬┤ij ).

            Let

            be the Fourier-delta module with generator e0.                                                         тАЛ




            A basis is

            28. Reduced Wick graph theorem
            This theorem is elementary and should be separated from the Costello analytic theorem.
            Assume the boundary Wick contraction is
                                                                                   тДП                                                  тДП
                           \contractionz1 z2 z1 z2 =                                 ,                     \contractionz2 z1 z2 z1 = тИТ .
                                                                                   2                                                  2
                                                     тАЛ           тАЛ    тАЛ   тАЛ         тАЛ                                               тАЛ       тАЛ   тАЛ   тАЛ       тАЛ




            A graph with r cross-contractions contributes
                                                                                                 r
                                                                              1 тДП
                                                                                ( ) P r (f , g).
                                                                              r! 2
                                                                               тАЛ             тАЛ




            Summing over r,
                                                                     f тЛЖ g = m тИШ eтДПP /2 (f тКЧ g).

            So the all-order Moyal product is proved in the reduced Wick model.
            The actual Costello graph theorem is the analytic statement that the renormalized BV
            brane-defect propagator reduces to this boundary contraction after gauge fixing,
            counterterms, scalar anomaly cancellation, and connected trace normalization.

            The reduced Hamiltonian Lie algebra is

            2. The Matlis cotangent module

            The Grothendieck residue pairing is

            3. The coadjoint action, calculated
            Define the coadjoint action by
                                                             тЯиf тЛЕ ╧Б, gтЯй = тИТтЯи╧Б, {f , g}тЯй.

            Let
                                                             f = z1p z2q , тАЛ       тАЛ               g = z1m z2n .    тАЛ                   тАЛ




            Then
                                                    {f , g} = (pn тИТ qm)z1p+mтИТ1 z2q+nтИТ1 .                                тАЛ                               тАЛ




            Pair with ╧Бa,b :    тАЛ




                                        тИТтЯи╧Бa,b , {f , g}тЯй = тИТ(pn тИТ qm)╬┤a,p+mтИТ1 ╬┤b,q+nтИТ1 .
                                                    тАЛ                                                                                           тАЛ               тАЛ




            The residue is nonzero precisely when
                                                    m = a тИТ p + 1,                                  n = b тИТ q + 1.

            Substitute into the coefficient:
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                                                                  319/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                                              Whitepaper Critical Analysis

                                      тИТ(pn тИТ qm) = тИТ(p(b тИТ q + 1) тИТ q(a тИТ p + 1)).

            Simplify:
             p(b тИТ q + 1) тИТ q(a тИТ p + 1) = pb тИТ pq + p тИТ qa + pq тИТ q = pb тИТ qa + p тИТ q.

            Therefore
                                         z1p z2q тЛЕ ╧Бa,b = тИТ(pb тИТ qa + p тИТ q)╧БaтИТp+1,bтИТq+1 .
                                             тАЛ   тАЛ           тАЛ                                                                                              тАЛ   тАЛ




            Negative-index targets are zero.
            In particular,
                                                                 z1 тЛЕ ╧Бa,b = тИТ(b + 1)╧Бa,b+1 ,
                                                                   тАЛ                   тАЛ                                                                тАЛ




                                                                 z2 тЛЕ ╧Бa,b = (a + 1)╧Бa+1,b .
                                                                       тАЛ                   тАЛ                                                        тАЛ




            This action is not polynomial. It is not locally nilpotent. It is the coadjoint principal-part
            action.

            4. The shifted cotangent Lie algebra
            Define
                                                                               g = h тЛЙ P [1].

            Let

            denote the shifted generator corresponding to ╧Бa,b тИИ P .                                                                тАЛ




            The brackets are
                                                                                     K

            Equivalently, if

            then
                                                                   [HI , ╬╖J ] = ALIJ ╬╖L .
                                                                                тАЛ               тАЛ                         тАЛ               тАЛ




            The Jacobi identity has three cases.
            For H, H, H , it is Jacobi of the Poisson bracket.
            For H, H, ╬╖, it is the representation identity
                                      [HI , HJ ] тЛЕ ╧БK = HI тЛЕ (HJ тЛЕ ╧БK ) тИТ HJ тЛЕ (HI тЛЕ ╧БK ),
                                            тАЛ       тАЛ         тАЛ                         тАЛ             тАЛ               тАЛ                               тАЛ   тАЛ   тАЛ




            which follows from the coadjoint action definition.
            For any bracket involving two ╬╖тАЩs, Jacobi is immediate because P [1] is abelian.
            Thus g is a graded Lie algebra.

            7. The centerpiece map

            8. The actual centerpiece object: the universal coupling

            The latest draftтАЩs ledger correctly distinguishes the coordinate CE/PV theorem from the

            9. Koszul duality as the classification of couplings
            Let A be any complete classical P0-algebra. Define
                                                        Z P0 (A) = (PV(A), [╧АA , тИТ]).
                                                              тАЛ




                                                                                                                                      тАЛ

            In coordinates,

            The CE equations become

            If ╬║ is also a P0-map, then the cotangent bracket gives the additional canonical relations
                                   тАЛ




                                                                           [X I , ╬╝J ] = ╬┤JI ,

            For the Dirac brane probe,

                                                               I             I

                                                                                              тАЛ                 тАЛ




            Thus the CE/PV theorem is not just a comparison. It is the universal solution of the

            This is the conceptual upgrade: Koszul duality is the grammar of allowable bulk-
            boundary couplings.

            10. The open trace representation
            Now construct the open side explicitly.
            Let
                                                               x = ╧Х1 ,          тАЛ        y = ╧Х2 .      тАЛ




            Let
                                                                    0
                                                                   Ccyc = CтЯиx, yтЯйcyc
                                                                         тАЛ                          тАЛ




            be cyclic words in x, y, and let
                                                                тИТ1
                                                               Ccyc = CтЯиx, y, ╧ИтЯй1╧И
                                                                     тАЛ




                                                                                cyc                         тАЛ




            be cyclic words with one ╧И.
            Define
                                                  Qx = Qy = 0,                           Q╧И = xy тИТ yx.

            Then
                                                             Q[╧Иvu] = [(xy тИТ yx)vu].

            By cyclicity,
                                                               [(xy)vu] = [uxyv],

                                                               [(yx)vu] = [uyxv].

            Hence
                                                         Q[╧Иvu] = [uxyv] тИТ [uyxv].

29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                      Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            So adjacent swaps are boundaries.
            Define

                                                                           тАЛ       тАЛ




            Choose a deterministic bubble-sort path

                                                                      тАЛ        тАЛ                         тАЛ




            At step s,
                                                 ws = As y xBs ,

                                                                                             s

                                                              QH + HQ = id тИТiN

            on degree-zero cyclic words.
            This is the explicit chain homotopy implementing commutativization.

            12. One-╧И descendants and why they are not P

                              тАЛ

            The latest manuscriptтАЩs local dictionary and Matlis lane already enforce this separation

            16. Algebraic unreduced centrality homotopy

            18. QME scalar cancellation data

                                                                           тДПN [c╦Й].

            Replace glN by gl(N тИгN ). Then
                               тАЛ




                                                              Str(I) = N тИТ N = 0.

            So the scalar term vanishes.
            18.2 Unreduced scalar primitive

            Then the scalar obstruction cancels.
            18.3 Central character

                                                                 ╧З(Tr(1)) = N .

            is absorbed into boundary data.

            23. Reduced Wick graph theorem

            renormalized BV brane-defect propagator induces this boundary contraction and solves
            the QME. That requires explicit data:

            Without those data, the reduced Wick theorem is complete, but the Costello realization
            is not a theorem.

            25. What this achieves
           The construction now has no certificate gap at the algebraic level.
           You have:
            1. the Hamiltonian Lie algebra;
            2. its continuous Matlis dual;
            3. the shifted cotangent Lie algebra;
            4. the CE algebra;
            5. the open Kirillov-Poisson algebra;
            6. the polyvector derived center;
            7. the explicit CE/PV map;
            8. the universal coupling Maurer-Cartan element;
            9. the trace representation on the Dirac brane probe;
           10. the brane-line current version;
           11. the reduced principal-part current model;
           12. the unreduced algebraic centrality homotopy;
           13. the scalar anomaly and its cancellation mechanisms;
           14. the Moyal deformation target;
           15. the principal-part quantum coadjoint action;
           16. the radial normalization scheme;
           17. the precise separation from analytic Costello/QME realization.
           The remaining distinction is not mathematical vagueness. It is source-data dependence:
           a full Costello graph theorem requires choosing a specific elliptic BV complex, gauge
           fixing, propagator, brane kernel, counterterm scheme, and QME trivialization. Once
           those are supplied, the reduced Wick/Moyal model above gives the target normalization.
           The clean conceptual sentence becomes:
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                      344/408

             Koszul duality classifies bulk-boundary couplings by converting closed CE fields in

            And the explicit realization is:

            That is the object the paper should be built around.

            You are right. The central theorem should not rest on тАЬfinite-window intuition,тАЭ тАЬformal
            Casimir language,тАЭ or тАЬthe usual Koszul story.тАЭ The object has to be built as a precise

            Below is the construction I would now install as the mathematical core of the paper. It is

            3. Formal-disk reconstruction without fake finite Lie
            quotients
            The formal disk is reconstructed by coordinate tests, not by Lie quotients.
            Let
                                                                            V = тиБ CeI           тАЛ                       тАЛ




                                                                                          IтИИI

            be the free vector space on the monomial labels. The formal Hamiltonian space h is the
            product completion

29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                            Whitepaper Critical Analysis

                                                                               h = тИП CHI          тАЛ                   тАЛ




                                                                                            IтИИI

            with the m-adic topology.
            The continuous dual is
                                                                   hтИиcont = тиБ C╬┤I .     тАЛ                 тАЛ               тАЛ




                                                                                             IтИИI

            A continuous functional depends on only finitely many Taylor coefficients.
            Now define the coordinate product completion of a polynomial algebra on variables xI ,
            I тИИ I , by
                                                                                                                                               тАЛ




                                                                 S ╬а (x I ) = тИП C x ╬▒ ,
                                                                   тАЛ            тАЛ                             тАЛ




                                                                                             ╬▒тИИN(I)

            where ╬▒ ranges over finite-support multiindices.
            Multiplication is well-defined because for a fixed finite-support multiindex ╬│ , there are
            only finitely many decompositions
                                                                               ╬│ = ╬▒ + ╬▓.

            So the coefficient of x╬│ in a product is a finite sum.
            For finite S тКВ I and degree d, define the finite coordinate projection
                                                    ╧АS,d : S╬а (xI ) тЯ╢
                                                             тАЛ         тАЛ            тАЛ

                                                                                                      ╬▒:supp ╬▒тКВS
                                                                                                         тИг╬▒тИгтЙдd
                                                                                                                                  тАЛ




            A map between coordinate product completions is coordinate-continuous if every finite
            projection ╧АS,d of its output depends on only finitely many input coordinates.
                                   тАЛ




            This replaces all naive finite Lie quotients.

            4. Coordinate CE algebra for the formal disk
            Define

            is the CE coordinate dual to the shifted cotangent generator ╬╖I = ╬┤I [1].                                  тАЛ   тАЛ

            For fixed K = (r, s), the set of pairs (I, J) satisfying

            For fixed K , this is generally an infinite sum. But it is coordinate-continuous: after
            projecting to any finite coordinate window in the output, only finitely many J, L survive.
            Indeed, for fixed K, J , the bracket determines L uniquely:
                                                                     L = K + J тИТ (1, 1).

            Conversely, for fixed finite output set of L, J , only finitely many pairs occur. Therefore
            dCE uK is a well-defined element of the coordinate product completion.

            Extend dCE as a derivation.
