            7. Bracket-admissible completions
            To obtain an honest P0-algebra, choose a subspace
                                               тАЛ




                                                                      B тКВ PVcoord (AтИВ )  тАЛ        тАЛ




            satisfying:
             1. B is closed under multiplication;
             2. B is closed under d╧А ;
             3. the Schouten bracket is continuous and convergent on B;
                                                   тАЛ




             4. ╬жтИТ1 coord (B) is closed under the transported cotangent bracket.
                             тАЛ




            Call such B bracket-admissible.
            Examples:
                 finite-support polynomial polyvectors;
                 weighted completions with exponential decay/growth chosen so the contraction
                 sum converges;
                 mixed nuclear completions where contraction is trace-class;
                 nilpotent truncations where only finitely many labels survive.
            For every bracket-admissible B, define
                                                                  тИЩ
                                                                 CCE,B (g) = ╬жтИТ1
                                                                         тАЛ




                                                                              coord (B).      тАЛ




            Then
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                              355/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                                                          Whitepaper Critical Analysis

                                                                                        тИЩ                                                                       тИ╝
                                                                                ╬жPB0 : CCE,B (g)
                                                                                              тАЛ




                                                                                                  тАЛ                            тАЛ                                    тАЛ   B       тАЛ




            is an isomorphism of dg P0-algebras.                тАЛ




            This is the correct bracketed theorem.
            The strict product/direct-sum object is not automatically one such B. The obstruction is
            the infinite contraction/Casimir phenomenon, which belongs to the endpoint problem,
            not to coordinate CE/PV.

            8. The missing central object: coordinate Maurer-Cartan
            coupling
            For a finite-dimensional Lie algebra l, the CE/PV isomorphism corresponds to the
            Maurer-Cartan element
                                ╬Шl = тИС ei тКЧ ╬╕i + тИС ╬╖i тКЧ Oi тИИ (l тЛЙ lтИи [1]) тКЧ PV(S(l)).
                                    тАЛ           тАЛ       тАЛ                                                     тАЛ   тАЛ                        тАЛ




                                            i                                             i

            It satisfies
                                                                                         1
                                                                                    d╬Шl + [╬Шl , ╬Шl ] = 0.
                                                                                         2
                                                                                                      тАЛ               тАЛ            тАЛ                тАЛ




            Proof:
            Write
                                            ╬ШH = тИС e i тКЧ ╬╕ i ,
                                                    тАЛ                           тАЛ     тАЛ                                                        ╬ШP = тИС ╬╖ i тКЧ O i .
                                                                                                                                                            тАЛ                       тАЛ   тАЛ   тАЛ




                                                                        i                                                                                                   i

            The l-component is
                                                                                                                          1
                                                    тИС ek тКЧ d╧А ╬╕ k +                                                         тИС[ei , ej ] тКЧ ╬╕i ╬╕j .
                                                                                                                          2
                                                                    тАЛ       тАЛ                             тАЛ                тАЛ                    тАЛ               тАЛ       тАЛ




                                                            k                                                                          i,j

            Using
                                                                                             1
                                                                                    d╧А ╬╕k = тИТ Cijk ╬╕i ╬╕j ,
                                                                                             2
                                                                                          тАЛ                                            тАЛ                тАЛ




            and
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                                                                                      356/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                                                         Whitepaper Critical Analysis

                                                                          [ei , ej ] = Cijk ek ,
                                                                                              тАЛ               тАЛ                          тАЛ               тАЛ




            this vanishes.
            The cotangent component is
                                                  тИС ╬╖k тКЧ d╧А Ok + тИС[ei , ╬╖j ] тКЧ ╬╕i Oj .
                                                        тАЛ    тАЛ                    тАЛ               тАЛ                              тАЛ               тАЛ                       тАЛ                       тАЛ




                                                    k                                                                      i,j

            The first term is
                                                                         тИС ╬╖k тКЧ Ckj
                                                                                 тДУ
                                                                                    OтДУ ╬╕ j .
                                                                                          тАЛ           тАЛ                              тАЛ               тАЛ




                                                                         k,j,тДУ

            The second term is exactly the negative of this after rewriting the coadjoint action in the
            dual basis. Hence the cotangent component vanishes.
            So ╬Шl is a Maurer-Cartan element.
                     тАЛ




            For the formal disk, the expression
                                                            тИС H I тКЧ ╬╕ I + тИС ╬╖I тКЧ O I
                                                                     тАЛ        тАЛ                                                              тАЛ                   тАЛ                       тАЛ




                                                             I                                                                   I

            is not automatically an element of the strict product/direct-sum tensor product.
            Therefore define the central object as follows.
            A coordinate Maurer-Cartan coupling is a dg algebra map
                                                           тИЩ
                                                 ╬жcoord : CCE,coord (g) тЖТ PVcoord (AтИВ ).                              тАЛ                                                              тАЛ       тАЛ




            Equivalently, it is a family of finite coordinate Maurer-Cartan equations, one for every
            finite coordinate projection ╧АS,d, compatible under refinement.
                                                                 тАЛ




            Thus the universal closed-open coupling object is
                                                                          Ucoord
                                                                           h     = ╬жcoord .                       тАЛ                                          тАЛ       тАЛ




            In any completion where the diagonal tensor converges, it is represented by the actual
            Maurer-Cartan element
                                                 ╬Шadm = тИС HI тКЧ ╬╕I + тИС ╬╖I тКЧ OI .       тАЛ                   тАЛ                                                                  тАЛ   тАЛ                   тАЛ   тАЛ




                                                                          I                                                                              I



https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                                                                                                   357/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                      Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            This resolves the missing-object problem without smuggling in a non-existent infinite
            Casimir.

            9. Matlis cotangent module
            Let

            13. Bar-cobar and conilpotence
            The bar-cobar/enveloping theorem must be stated only for an admissible system.
            A filtered dg Lie algebra gadm is bar-cobar admissible if it has a complete separated
            descending filtration
                                                         тАЛ




                                                              F 1 gadm тКГ F 2 gadm тКГ тЛп
                                                                            тАЛ                         тАЛ




            such that:
             1. gadm тЙЕ lim gadm /F r ;
             2. [F p , F q ] тКВ F p+q ;
                           тАЛ          тАЛ       тАЛ




             3. each grpF gadm is finite-dimensional;
             4. the CE coalgebra is conilpotent with respect to the induced filtration;
                                  тАЛ       тАЛ




             5. the PBW filtration on U (gadm ) is complete and separated.
                                                                тАЛ




            Then
                                                                                         тИ╝
                                                             ╬йCтИЧCE (gadm )
                                                                    тАЛ           тАЛ            тАЛ   U (gadm ).
                                                                                                          тАЛ




            This is Layer 1/2. It is not used to prove the Layer 3 CE/PV coordinate theorem.
            The full Hamiltonian algebra h is perfect; pronilpotence must not be silently substituted
            for conilpotence. Any use of bar-cobar/Koszul enveloping duality must first specify gadm
            .
                                                                                                                   тАЛ




            This directly resolves blocker 4.

            17. Universal principal-part extension
            The reduced principal-part target has the following universal property.
            Let A be a scalar-reduced Hamiltonian P0-algebra containing Hamiltonian currents
            Bf (a). A principal-part cotangent extension of A is a P0 -algebra E with an abelian
                                                                                               тАЛ




            shifted ideal M [1] and a map
                    тАЛ                                                                                                      тАЛ




                                                                             PI тЖТ M           тАЛ




            such that
                                                          {Bf (a), ╬Ш╧Б (B)} = ╬Шf тЛЕ╧Б (aB),
                                                               тАЛ              тАЛ                                    тАЛ




            and
                                                                           {╬Ш╧Б , ╬Ш╧Г } = 0.
                                                                                      тАЛ




            Then
                                                              pp
                                                             AтИВ (I) = S (hI )тКЧS (PI [1])
                                                                       тАЛ                              тАЛ    тАЛ           тАЛ




            is initial among such extensions.
            Proof: any such extension receives a unique algebra map from the free graded-
            commutative algebra on hI тКХ PI [1], and the bracket relations force exactly the
            displayed P0-structure. Jacobi is exactly the coadjoint representation identity.
                                                      тАЛ            тАЛ




                                тАЛ




            This supplies a mathematically constructed replacement target for cotangent modes. It
            does not claim those generators are already present in the unreduced polynomial open
            BV algebra.

                                                                                ╬╖(1) = тИТ1.

29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                    Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            Thus ╧Й defines a nontrivial scalar-extension class
                                                                          2
                                                                  [c╦Й] тИИ HLie (A╦Й, C).        тАЛ

            and states the cancellation alternatives.                                 main

            The rigorous statement is:
                                                                                  тДПN [c╦Й]                 тАЛ




            is the scalar brane-defect QME obstruction class.
            It is killed by:

            These are mechanisms, not an exhaustive classification unless one proves the full
            obstruction cohomology.

            1. First correction: no naive finite Lie quotients

            Theorem 1.2: the formal disk is reconstructed by coordinate tests,

            coordinate tests.

            Multiplication is well-defined because for each fixed output pair (╬│, ╬┤), there are only
            finitely many decompositions
                                                             (╬│, ╬┤) = (╬▒, ╬▓) + (╬▒тА▓ , ╬▓ тА▓ ).

https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                                       381/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                   Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            A linear map
                                                                T : Ocoord тЖТ Ocoord     тАЛ                             тАЛ




            is coordinate-continuous if for every output monomial coefficient, the coefficient of
            T (F ) depends on only finitely many coefficients of F .

            This is the correct replacement for тАЬfinite windows.тАЭ
            A finite coordinate test is:
                                                              ╧А╬У : Ocoord тЖТ тиБ C m
                                                                    тАЛ           тАЛ                             тАЛ




                                                                                                 mтИИ╬У

            for a finite set ╬У of monomials. Two coordinate-continuous maps are equal if and only if
            their composites with ╧А╬У agree for all finite ╬У.
                                                  тАЛ




            3. Coordinate CE algebra of the formal disk
            Define
                                                              тИЩ
                                                             CCE,coord (g) = тИП C u╬▒ c╬▓ ,
                                                                            тАЛ                             тАЛ




                                                                                             ╬▒,╬▓

            where
                                                                        g = h тЛЙ hтИиcont [1].           тАЛ




            Here cI is dual to HI , and uI is dual to the shifted cotangent generator ╬┤I [1].
                                            тАЛ            тАЛ                                                                тАЛ




            Define the differential on generators by
                                                                       1
                                                             dCE cK = тИТ тИС CIJ c c .
                                                                           K I J
                                                                       2
                                                                тАЛ                   тАЛ             тАЛ               тАЛ




                                                                                            I,J

            For fixed K = (r, s), the condition
                                                                I + J тИТ (1, 1) = K

            has finitely many solutions in I ├Ч I . Thus dCEcK is a finite sum.               тАЛ




            For uK , define
                       тАЛ




https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                    382/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                            Whitepaper Critical Analysis

                                                             dCE uK = тИС CKJ
                                                                тАЛ       тАЛ
                                                                         L
                                                                            uL c J .
                                                                                  тАЛ       тАЛ           тАЛ




                                                                            J,L

            For fixed K, J , L is determined by
                                                              L = K + J тИТ (1, 1).

            Hence dCEuK is generally infinite, but it is coordinate-continuous: for any fixed output
            monomial, only finitely many input monomials can contribute to its coefficient.
                               тАЛ       тАЛ




            Extend dCE as a graded derivation.
                                   тАЛ




            Lemma 3.1: dCE is coordinate-continuous
                                            тАЛ




            Fix an output monomial u╬│ c╬┤ . In dCE(u╬▒ c╬▓ ), a contributing term arises by replacing one
            factor cK by two cтАЩs or replacing one factor uK by uLcJ .
                                                                    тАЛ




                                                                                      тАЛ           тАЛ




            Because u╬│ c╬┤ has finite support, there are only finitely many positions and only finitely
            many possible K, L, J that can produce it. Therefore its coefficient in dF depends on
            finitely many coefficients of F .
            So dCE is a well-defined coordinate-continuous derivation.
                           тАЛ




            Lemma 3.2: d2CE = 0                 тАЛ




            It is enough to check on generators.
            For cK , d2cK = 0 is exactly the Jacobi identity for the structure constants CIJK .               тАЛ




            For uK , the identity d2uK = 0 is exactly the representation identity for the coadjoint
            action.
                       тАЛ                                тАЛ




            Every coefficient of d2uK is a finite sum, so the formal coordinate calculation is
            legitimate.
                                                    тАЛ




            Thus
                                                                 тИЩ
                                                               (CCE,coord (g), dCE )
                                                                              тАЛ               тАЛ           тАЛ




            is a well-defined coordinate dg commutative algebra.

            Lemma 4.1: d╧А is coordinate-continuous

            Lemma 4.2: d2╧А = 0                     тАЛ

            Schouten/Jacobi calculation.

            is not automatically defined for arbitrary coordinate-product series F , G. A single

            6. Bracket-admissible P0 -realizations                                тАЛ




            The coordinate theorem is not yet a global P0-theorem. To get one, define admissibility.   тАЛ




            A subalgebra
                                                                  B тКВ PVcoord (AтИВ )                             тАЛ                   тАЛ




            is bracket-admissible if:
             1. B is a complete graded-commutative subalgebra;
             2. B is stable under d╧А ;
             3. the Schouten contraction sum defining [F , G]S converges for all F , G тИИ B;
                                                       тАЛ




             4. [F , G]S тИИ B;
                                                                                                                                тАЛ




             5. ╬жтИТ1coord (B) is closed under the transported cotangent bracket.
                                 тАЛ




                             тАЛ




            Then
                                                                ╬жPB0 : ╬жтИТ1

                                                                              тАЛ                            тАЛ

29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                                         Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            is an isomorphism of dg P0-algebras.        тАЛ




            This is the bracketed theorem.
            Explicit admissible realization 1: finite-support polynomial
            polyvectors
            Let
                                                                    Bfin = C[OI ]fin тКЧ ╬Ы(╬╕I )fin ,
                                                                                  тАЛ                   тАЛ      тАЛ                           тАЛ




            where every element uses only finitely many labels I .
            Then the Schouten contraction sum is finite. Hence Bfin is bracket-admissible.                                       тАЛ




            This gives the rigorous finite-support P0-model.                              тАЛ




            Explicit admissible realization 2: weighted rapidly decaying
            completion
            Fix q > 1. For n тИИ N, define the weight
                                                            wq,n (a, b) = q a+b (1 + a + b)n .
                                                                          тАЛ




            Let
                       Eq = {x = тИС xI HI тИеxтИеq,n := тИС тИгxI тИгwq,n (I) < тИЮ for all n} .

                                               I                                                                 I

            This is a Fr├йchet space of exponentially decaying Taylor coefficients with all polynomial
            moments finite.
            The Poisson bracket is continuous on Eq . Indeed, for monomials,                      тАЛ




                                                   [Ha,b , Hc,d ] = (ad тИТ bc)Ha+cтИТ1,b+dтИТ1 ,
                                                                тАЛ                     тАЛ                                                          тАЛ




            and
                                                                    тИгad тИТ bcтИг тЙд (a + b)(c + d).

                                wq,n (a + c тИТ 1, b + d тИТ 1) тЙд Cq,n wq,n+2 (a, b)wq,n+2 (c, d),
                                      тАЛ                                                                                  тАЛ           тАЛ               тАЛ




            the convolution estimate gives

                                                   тИе[x, y]тИеq,n тЙд Cq,n тИеxтИеq,n+2 тИеyтИеq,n+2 .

            Thus the bracket is continuous.
            Similarly, the contraction sum defining the Schouten bracket is continuous on the
            corresponding nuclear/K├╢the polyvector completion built from Eq and its strong dual. In
            that weighted realization, the diagonal contraction is summable because coefficients in
                                                                                                                                              тАЛ




            one factor decay exponentially while dual coefficients grow at most with the controlled
            reciprocal weight.
            Call this completion

            Then
                                                                                          Bq              тАЛ




            is bracket-admissible.
            This gives an explicit mixed/weighted P0-realization.             тАЛ

            7. The missing object: the universal coordinate coupling

            is not automatically a tensor in the strict product/direct-sum topology. Therefore the
            universal object is not a naked infinite Casimir. It is the coordinate morphism plus its

            9. Bar-cobar admissibility
            Do not use bar-cobar/Koszul enveloping duality for the full formal Hamiltonian algebra
            without hypotheses.
            A filtered Tate Lie algebra gadm is bar-cobar admissible if:
                                                              тАЛ




             1. it has a complete separated descending filtration F тИЩgadm ;
             2. [F p , F q ] тКВ F p+q ;
                                                                                                                            тАЛ




             3. each grpF gadm is finite-dimensional;
             4. the CE coalgebra CтИЧCE(gadm ) is conilpotent for the induced filtration;
                                 тАЛ        тАЛ




             5. the completed PBW filtration on U (gadm ) is complete and separated;
                                                      тАЛ           тАЛ




             6. the completed symmetric associated graded exists:
                                                                                            тАЛ




                                                                      gr U (gadm ) тЙЕ S (gadm ).
                                                                                        тАЛ                               тАЛ




            Only then assert
                                                                                                тИ╝
                                                             ╬йCтИЧCE (gadm )тАЛ        тАЛ                 тАЛ   U (gadm ). тАЛ




            The full Hamiltonian algebra h is perfect and has linear/quadratic nonconilpotent pieces.
            Pronilpotence must not be silently treated as conilpotence.
https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                                      391/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                                                           Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            The current draftтАЩs theorem lane already states that the conilpotent bar-cobar template
            is used only in its own hypothesis, and that the untruncated formal Hamiltonian algebra
            is not used as lower-central conilpotent input.

            11. PBW ╬и versus Matlis ╧Б
            The polynomial one-╧И descendants ╬иa,b are PBW special-fibre labels.тАЛ




            They are not the Matlis coadjoint module.
            The no-go proof is elementary.
            The polynomial descendant action contains
                                                                   O1,0 тЛЕ ╬иa,b = b ╬иa,bтИТ1 .

            for every r.

            12. Factorization variance

                                                                    hI = ╬йтИЩc (I)тКЧh.
                                                                          тАЛ                       тАЛ                       тАЛ

                                                                      j! : hI тЖТ hJ .

                                                                                  CCE (hI )

            are contravariant under pullback.

            data.

            If B is additionally kernel-admissible, so that the diagonal tensor converges, then the
            isomorphism is represented by the Maurer-Cartan element
                                                   ╬ШB = тИС H I тКЧ ╬╕ I + тИС ╬╖ I тКЧ O I ,
                                                          тАЛ                     тАЛ           тАЛ                                               тАЛ       тАЛ           тАЛ




                                                                    I                                                                 I

            satisfying
                                                                       1
                                                                  d╬ШB + [╬ШB , ╬ШB ] = 0.
                                                                       2
                                                                            тАЛ                   тАЛ                 тАЛ                   тАЛ




            In the strict product/direct-sum endpoint, ╬ШB is not asserted to exist.                       тАЛ




            (6) Boundary meaning
            Under the stable scalar-reduced Dirac brane trace identification,
                                                                   OI = Tr HI (╧Х1 , ╧Х2 ).
                                                                        тАЛ                                             тАЛ       тАЛ                 тАЛ




            Thus the boundary Hamiltonian observable is the image of uI , not cI . The Hamiltonian
            ghost coordinate cI maps to the corresponding vector-field operation ╬╕I .
                                                                                                                                                            тАЛ




            This theorem is the central theorem. Everything else is a lane around it.

            23. What this achieves
            This construction plugs the real central gap.
            It gives:
             finite theorem тЗТ coordinate formal-disk theorem тЗТ bracket-admissible P0 theorem            тАЛ




https://chatgpt.com/c/69efa84c-a760-83ea-ae70-183a06ecd2d3                                                  407/408
29/04/2026, 20:04                                                              Whitepaper Critical Analysis

            It prevents four false moves:
             1. treating Taylor truncations as finite Lie quotients;
             2. treating coordinate product PV as an automatic P0-algebra;
             3. treating a nonconvergent diagonal Casimir as part of the coordinate theorem;
                                                                                                 тАЛ




             4. treating bar-cobar/Koszul duality as available without conilpotence.
            And it gives the missing object:
                                                       Uh = (╬жcoord , {╬жPB0 }, {╬ШB }) .

                                                                                       тАЛ




                                                                                           тАЛ         тАЛ        тАЛ




            This is the EtingofтАУKacтАУKazhdan-level formulation: theorem first in finite algebra, then
            formal coordinate reconstruction, then admissible completions, then obstruction-
            controlled analytic upgrades.
